note: Family Feud (NES, 1991) is a quiz/game show adaptation with limited music and SFX documentation available. The Wikipedia source provides developer and composer credits (Tania Smith) but no detailed audio specifications, tempo, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics. The game is primarily voice/dialogue-driven as a Family Feud game show adaptation rather than having substantial instrumental music or dynamic SFX systems typical of action games.
